description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a natural light wood finish, featuring two sliding glass doors on the front that reveal four interior shelves. The lower section contains two pull-out drawers with simple rectangular handles, providing additional storage space. The cabinet stands on four straight legs, elevating it slightly off the ground and giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The sides and back are solid wood panels, while the front is dominated by the transparent glass doors, allowing visibility of the contents inside. The craftsmanship appears clean and functional, with smooth surfaces and subtle wood grain visible throughout. This type of cabinet is suitable for storing books, display items, or household goods in urban environments such as apartments, offices, or community spaces.
description: A tall, light wood cabinet with sliding glass doors, four shelves, and two lower drawers, standing on four legs. Its minimalist design and transparent front make it ideal for display and storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding glass doors, four interior shelves, and two lower drawers with handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid wood back panel with no openings or details.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a solid wood panel, mirroring the left side.
